# Old Qusaiba Outcrop

**Summary**: A specific outcrop area in the Qasim District of central Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] conducted field studies at the Old Qusaiba Village outcrops.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] Central Arabian arch

## Formations Present

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] sharawra-formation, qusaiba-formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The study area is shown in Figure 1.2, where Silurian deposits extend along an area of six kilometers. ([[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016, p. 27]])
